name: scope-exclude-knob
title: First-class codas scope-exclude knob — decouple hash-scope from gitignore (generalize W7 derived_output)
description: A codas-native 'committed but NOT in the byte-identical hash' lever, decoupled from gitignore. Generalizes W7 wiki.book_root/derived_output_prefixes into a config scope.exclude. Keeps default-govern (missing_owner relies on it). gate-semantics (touches scan/hash scope) -> codex DESIGN review before impl.
creator: oydodo
